title: daemonorops fissilis
intro: Daemonorops fissilis, also known as the fissile palm, is a species of palm tree native to Southeast Asia. The resin extracted from the plant contains medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Daemonorops fissilis resin include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues. The resin is often prepared for herbal use in the form of tinctures or infusions, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
